title: Simple Emerald Armor and Tools
description: Adds balanced emerald tools, armor, and horse armor to Minecraft! Also adds them to certain vanilla chests.
body:
Adds balanced emerald tools, armor, and horse armor to Minecraft! These items are intended to be in between iron and diamond tiers. The armor (which is trimmable) is slightly better than iron, while the tools have a slower swing rate but deal more damage.

These items can also be found in various structures in place of iron or golden items, such as in temples or ruins, to help them integrate with the in-game world and existing gear.

![A showcase of all Emerald Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/183af22a04d1796001ef2217a6d338ed9f42505e.png)

# [Also see Simple Copper Armor and Tools!](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-copper-armor-and-tools)
